message:
fix(conformance): fix clip null kind expectation and DataFrame op error types

1. Updated clip fixture to expect na_n instead of null for Float64 columns
   (pandas normalizes all missing values to NaN for float columns)

2. Fixed DataFrame mode/cumsum/cumprod/cummax/cummin match arms to use
   .map_err(|err| err.to_string()) for consistent error handling with
   astype/clip/abs/round operations added in previous commit

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
